data.raceComments: {"comment":"1. ZIPPING OLSEN has been beaten for early speed lately, last time finishing fourth (24.31) in a Mix 5 at this track. Good beginner assisted by the inside draw. Worth another chance. 2. VALIDATED has been beaten for early speed lately, last time finishing sixth (24.52) in a Mix 5 at this track. Safe beginner who has drawn to advantage. Leading chance. 8. BAHAMA BLUE drawn the outside box and could get a clear run. Was below best last time when 8th and beaten 10 lengths at this track (24.46). Goes very well at course and distance boasting eight wins. Has good speed and can quickly clear the pack out wide. Cannot be taken lightly. 5. ASTRO LEE is worth consideration.","runners":[1,2,8,5],"exclusive":false}
